title: BackColorLocked
text: BackColorLocked Color of the panel button when it is selected and stays selected. Valid value is a web color name, system color name, or an RGB hexadecimal number (prefixed by a hash mark). (Decimal RGB colors are not supported.) This property can only be set in the .ini file. ;usys.ini [application] panel=upanel( BackColorLocked= Color ) Copy For more information, see Standard Colors . This topic will not be included in the Uniface Library build until user-defined panel styling is enabled For example: ;usys.ini [application] panel=upanel(backcolor=blue;backcolorlocked=white) Copy Applies To Panels Was this topic helpful?
